title: Beam Therapeutics Q1 2026 Financial Results and Business Updates
text: Beam Therapeutics Inc. reported first quarter 2026 financial results and provided updates across the company's hematology and genetic disease franchises. License and collaboration revenue rose to $31.7 million, up from $7.5 million a year earlier, while net loss narrowed to $94.3 million or $0.91 per share. Cash, cash equivalents and marketable securities were $1.2 billion as of March 31, 2026, compared to $1.2 billion as of December 31, 2025. R&D expenses were $104.5 million for the first quarter of 2026, compared to $98.8 million for the first quarter of 2025. The updated topline data from BEAM-302 including robust increases in total AAT and a well-tolerated safety profile give the company high confidence in the 60 mg optimal biological dose and a clear path to initiating the pivotal cohort in the second half of this year. With a strong cash position extending their runway into mid-2029, the company has the financial foundation to execute across all of their priorities.
